assertions.title: Start new meditation - Marcus greets user by name

steps.action: Clear all data via API and navigate to app
steps.observed: Onboarding form displayed with Name and About You fields
Home page shown with profile display showing 'Validation User'

steps.expected: Session starts, Marcus greets user by name
steps.observed: Greeting displayed: 'I am Marcus. Greetings, Validation User. Speak your mind, and let us explore the terrain of your thoughts together.'

assertions.title: Send and receive messages - AI responds with streaming text

steps.action: Type message about work stress in chat input
steps.observed: Message typed: 'I've been feeling really stressed about work lately...'

steps.expected: Message appears in chat, AI starts streaming
steps.observed: User message displayed, AI responded with streaming stoic text that completed

steps.expected: Complete AI response with stoic wisdom
steps.observed: AI response included Epictetus quote, Meditations 4.22 quote, follow-up question, and reflection exercise. Response completed fully.

assertions.title: Message persistence - refresh page preserves messages

steps.observed: User message sent, AI responded fully. Both messages visible.

steps.expected: All messages preserved, still in active session
steps.observed: Page reset to welcome screen ('Meditation with Marcus Aurelius' / 'Begin Meditation' button). All messages lost from UI.
Backend API returned 2 messages for the session - data IS persisted server-side. Issue is frontend store not restoring session.

evidence.network: Session data exists on backend - verified via GET /api/sessions. Issue: Zustand store resets to initial state (status='idle', messages=[]) on page reload with no restoration logic.

assertions.issues: BUG: Zustand session store has no persistence mechanism. On page refresh, store resets to empty state and no code attempts to restore the current session from localStorage or API. Backend data is intact - this is purely a frontend bug.

steps.action: Send 3 messages in session to build conversation
steps.observed: 3 messages sent and received with rich stoic responses
'Session Complete' heading displayed with 'Marcus's Reflection' containing key points from conversation
Comprehensive summary covering: control vs acceptance, emotions as growth opportunities, inner strength, character over external events. Matched conversation themes accurately.

assertions.title: Action items - 1-3 concrete action items after session end

steps.observed: Under 'Your Commitments' section, 3 action items displayed:

steps.action: Verify action item count and quality
steps.observed: 3 items: (1) 'Schedule a daily meditation practice to cultivate inner strength and resilience' (2) 'Reframe your relationship with emotions, viewing them as opportunities for growth rather than weaknesses' (3) 'Identify one external factor that is beyond your control and focus on what you can influence instead'

evidence.network: Action items returned in POST /api/sessions/{id}/end-and-summarize response

assertions.title: Empty state - no past sessions shows appropriate message

steps.observed: API confirmed: 1 profile, 1 session, 2 messages cleared

steps.action: Create profile to access app (required to reach history page)
steps.observed: Profile 'Validation User' created successfully
Empty state shows: 'No Meditations Yet' heading, 'No meditations yet. Begin your first meditation.' text, and 'Begin Meditation' button

assertions.title: Error handling - Ollama offline shows appropriate error message

steps.observed: Session started, greeting displayed
Ollama confirmed stopped (curl to localhost:11434/api/tags failed)

steps.action: Type and send message in chat
steps.observed: Error message displayed: 'Unable to connect to AI. Please ensure Ollama is running.' User message remained visible in chat.
Ollama restarted from /Applications/Ollama.app, model llama3.2:latest confirmed available

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/{id}/chat -> error response when Ollama down

title: Conversation flow guidance - Marcus guides naturally with follow-ups and stoic perspectives

steps.observed: Response included Epictetus quote (Discourses 1.26), Meditations 4.22, focus-on-control advice, and follow-up: 'What is one thing you can control today?'

steps.action: Send message 2: nothing is in my control
steps.observed: Marcus used user's name, referenced Meditations Book 4 Section 3, cited Epictetus, reframed the problem as perception vs reality, and asked: 'What small step can you take today?'

steps.action: Send message 3: emotions feel like weakness
steps.observed: Excellent response referencing personal experience (Antonine Plague), Meditations Book 4 Section 28 and Book 5 Section 6, nature metaphors (river, bending trees), Temperance concept. Reframed emotions as natural responses, not weaknesses.

evidence.network: Multiple streaming SSE responses - all completed successfully

frictions.description: User greeting with name is inconsistent on subsequent sessions. First session showed 'Greetings, Validation User' but after page refresh and restart, greeting showed without the name. Appears to be a race condition where the profile hasn't loaded from API when the greeting renders.
frictions.resolution: Waited for profile to load, but the initial render showed the anonymous version. Component should wait for profile before displaying the greeting.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 7 passed, 1 failed (VAL-MEDIT-003: message persistence on page refresh fails due to frontend store reset. Backend data is intact - this is a Zustand store persistence bug that needs zustand/persist middleware or manual session restoration on mount).
